name: -+Sweet, Sweet Revenge+-
description:
He's been waiting...

All for this exact moment.

Male!POV x PreForsaken!007n7

You've been friends with 007n7 for a while.

Sure, you rejected him (your first mistake), and said you'd never, ever, EVER date someone like him...(that was your second)

And to top it all off, you said you HATED him!

(That was the last straw)

So he devised a plan.

He became...

"Tame."

He gained your trust.

And then, when you trusted him well enough- REALLY, REALLY trusted him...

He baked you cookies and made even a glass of milk.

...

What did he put in those cookies, you asked?

Love.

Lots, and lots, and lots of love.

🚨BEFORE YOU SCROLL🚨
